articles.title: Kwara community celebrates return of abducted worshippers

articles.title: 'Will companies compensate if E-20 fuel damages older vehicles?': Arvind Kejriwal asks auto firms
articles.excerpt: Arvind Kejriwal has written to 29 auto manufacturers regarding E-20 fuel concerns. He questioned companies about compensation for mileage drops or component damage. Union Minister Hardeep Singh Puri dismissed reports of customer problems with E20 fuel. India …
